properties.notes: Corrected from an originally supplied coordinate (lon 3.57), which was ~53 km off. That longitude falls outside the Lekki Free Trade Zone entirely (zone spans lon ~3.95-4.02 per OSM); this value matches GEM wiki within 100m

Corrected from an originally supplied coordinate that was ~5.5 km off. Matches GEM wiki within 100m

No independent plant-level coordinate found - town-level precision only
Coincides with the Brass LNG Terminal site in the GGIT infrastructure data - likely the same industrial site
Refined using Alesa (Eleme LGA), the specific locality cited for this refinery in company/regulatory references
Corrected from an originally supplied coordinate that was ~7.5 km off
Corrected from an originally supplied coordinate that was ~13 km off. Matches Global Energy Observatory within 100m
Originally supplied coordinate was already a close match (~1.9 km)
Corrected to the actual cement factory node; previously used its co-located captive power station as a proxy

Matches GEM wiki within 500m

Operator not yet confirmed; no OSM match found
